proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ECOG performance status (ecog_ps) is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope of pfs on ecog_ps).

analyses.result_summary: Linear regression of pfs_months on ecog_ps: slope=-1.190 months/ECOG point, p=0.00e+00. Mean PFS by ECOG: 0=5.27, 1=4.05, 2=2.91.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with stage_iv=1 have shorter pfs_months than patients with stage_iv=0.

analyses.result_summary: Stage IV mean PFS = 3.70 vs non-stage-IV 5.05 (diff=-1.35 months, Welch t=-68.5, p=0.00e+00).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Older age_years is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Female patients (sex_female=1) have different pfs_months than male patients (sex_female=0).
Right-sided primary tumors (right_sided_primary=1) have shorter pfs_months than left-sided.

analyses.result_summary: Slope of pfs on age = 0.1765 months/year, p=0.00e+00.
Mean PFS female=4.31 vs male=4.31, diff=-0.01, p=7.70e-01.
Mean PFS right-sided=4.11 vs left/transverse=4.42, diff=-0.31, p=1.04e-49.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher cea_ng_ml is associated with shorter pfs_months (linear slope hypothesis: nonzero).
Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months (linear slope hypothesis: nonzero).
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (linear slope hypothesis: nonzero).
Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with shorter pfs_months (linear slope hypothesis: nonzero).
Higher crp_mg_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (linear slope hypothesis: nonzero).
Higher nlr is associated with longer pfs_months (linear slope hypothesis: nonzero).
Higher hemoglobin_g_dl is associated with shorter pfs_months (linear slope hypothesis: nonzero).
Higher alkaline_phosphatase_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (linear slope hypothesis: nonzero).
Higher ast_u_l is associated with longer pfs_months (linear slope hypothesis: nonzero).
Higher alt_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (linear slope hypothesis: nonzero).
Higher total_bilirubin_mg_dl is associated with shorter pfs_months (linear slope hypothesis: nonzero).
Higher creatinine_mg_dl is associated with shorter pfs_months (linear slope hypothesis: nonzero).
Higher bun_mg_dl is associated with shorter pfs_months (linear slope hypothesis: nonzero).
Higher sodium_meq_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (linear slope hypothesis: nonzero).
Higher potassium_meq_l is associated with longer pfs_months (linear slope hypothesis: nonzero).
Higher calcium_mg_dl is associated with shorter pfs_months (linear slope hypothesis: nonzero).

analyses.result_summary: Slope of pfs on cea_ng_ml = -0.0053, p=3.13e-17.
Slope of pfs on albumin_g_dl = 0.4654, p=3.25e-115.
Slope of pfs on ldh_u_l = -0.0003, p=1.26e-02.
Slope of pfs on weight_loss_pct_6mo = -0.0730, p=2.21e-167.
Slope of pfs on crp_mg_l = -0.0020, p=6.50e-02.
Slope of pfs on nlr = 0.0052, p=2.90e-01.
Slope of pfs on hemoglobin_g_dl = -0.0101, p=7.77e-02.
Slope of pfs on alkaline_phosphatase_u_l = -0.0006, p=4.13e-03.
Slope of pfs on ast_u_l = 0.0009, p=3.22e-01.
Slope of pfs on alt_u_l = -0.0008, p=3.52e-01.
Slope of pfs on total_bilirubin_mg_dl = -0.0653, p=4.40e-02.
Slope of pfs on creatinine_mg_dl = -0.0457, p=1.84e-01.
Slope of pfs on bun_mg_dl = -0.0020, p=3.35e-01.
Slope of pfs on sodium_meq_l = -0.0006, p=8.71e-01.
Slope of pfs on potassium_meq_l = 0.0391, p=5.52e-02.
Slope of pfs on calcium_mg_dl = -0.0331, p=1.06e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with kras_mutation=1 have shorter pfs_months than patients with kras_mutation=0.
Patients with nras_mutation=1 have longer pfs_months than patients with nras_mutation=0.
Patients with braf_v600e=1 have shorter pfs_months than patients with braf_v600e=0.
Patients with msi_high=1 have shorter pfs_months than patients with msi_high=0.
Patients with her2_amplified=1 have shorter pfs_months than patients with her2_amplified=0.
Patients with ntrk_fusion=1 have longer pfs_months than patients with ntrk_fusion=0.

analyses.result_summary: kras_mutation: pos=4.12 vs neg=4.45 (diff=-0.33, p=1.86e-58, n_pos=20898).
nras_mutation: pos=4.53 vs neg=4.30 (diff=+0.22, p=7.31e-04, n_pos=1506).
msi_high: pos=4.29 vs neg=4.31 (diff=-0.02, p=6.80e-01, n_pos=2513).
her2_amplified: pos=4.26 vs neg=4.31 (diff=-0.06, p=3.60e-01, n_pos=1504).
ntrk_fusion: pos=4.35 vs neg=4.31 (diff=+0.04, p=7.86e-01, n_pos=251).

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_cetuximab is associated with longer pfs_months on average (positive main effect).

analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted: cetux=4.29 vs ctrl=4.32 (diff=-0.04, p=8.80e-02). Adjusted (age/sex/ECOG/stage): coef=-0.012, p=2.32e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_bevacizumab is associated with longer pfs_months on average (positive main effect).

analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted: bev=4.30 vs ctrl=4.32 (diff=-0.02, p=3.54e-01). Adjusted: coef=+0.007, p=4.27e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_pembrolizumab is associated with longer pfs_months on average across the whole cohort.

analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted: pembro=4.32 vs ctrl=4.31 (diff=+0.01, p=8.56e-01). Adjusted: coef=+0.006, p=6.43e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_encorafenib is associated with longer pfs_months across the whole cohort.

analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted: enco=4.32 vs ctrl=4.31 (diff=+0.01, p=8.73e-01). Adjusted: coef=+0.002, p=9.06e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib is associated with longer pfs_months across the whole cohort.

analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted: trast/tuc=4.27 vs ctrl=4.32 (diff=-0.04, p=2.44e-01). Adjusted: coef=+0.016, p=3.48e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_regorafenib is associated with longer pfs_months across the whole cohort.

analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted: rego=5.09 vs ctrl=4.12 (diff=+0.97, p=1.71e-216). Adjusted: coef=+0.935, p=0.00e+00.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The effect of treatment_cetuximab on pfs_months differs between KRAS-mutated and KRAS-wildtype patients (interaction).
The effect of treatment_cetuximab on pfs_months differs between NRAS-mutated and NRAS-wildtype patients (interaction).
The effect of treatment_cetuximab on pfs_months differs between BRAF V600E-mutated and BRAF wildtype patients (interaction).
The effect of treatment_cetuximab on pfs_months differs between right-sided and left-sided primary tumors (interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Cetuximab effect in KRAS-mut=-0.03 vs KRAS-wt=-0.05; interaction coef=+0.020, p=6.65e-01.
Cetuximab effect in NRAS-mut=-0.04 vs NRAS-wt=-0.04; interaction coef=-0.007, p=9.60e-01.
Cetuximab effect in BRAFV600E-pos=-0.06 vs BRAF-wt=-0.04; interaction coef=-0.026, p=8.05e-01.
Cetuximab effect right-sided=-0.02 vs left-sided=-0.05; interaction coef=+0.026, p=5.83e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The effect of treatment_pembrolizumab on pfs_months is much larger (more positive) in MSI-high patients than in MSI-stable patients (positive interaction).
The effect of treatment_pembrolizumab on pfs_months differs between BRAF V600E and BRAF wildtype patients (interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Pembro effect in MSI-high=+0.01 vs MSI-stable=+0.01; interaction coef=+0.002, p=9.88e-01. n(MSI-high & pembro)=396.
Pembro x BRAF V600E interaction coef=+0.070, p=6.11e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The effect of treatment_encorafenib on pfs_months is positive and larger in BRAF V600E-mutated patients than in BRAF wildtype patients (positive interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Encorafenib effect in BRAFV600E=-0.13 vs BRAF-wt=+0.01; interaction coef=-0.141, p=3.76e-01. n(BRAF & enco)=242.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The effect of treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib on pfs_months is positive and larger in HER2-amplified patients than in HER2-non-amplified patients (positive interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Trast/tuc effect in HER2-amp=+0.02 vs HER2-neg=-0.05; interaction coef=+0.063, p=7.78e-01. n(HER2-amp & trast/tuc)=120.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The effect of treatment_bevacizumab on pfs_months differs between kras_mutation=1 and kras_mutation=0 patients (interaction).
The effect of treatment_bevacizumab on pfs_months differs between right_sided_primary=1 and right_sided_primary=0 patients (interaction).
The effect of treatment_bevacizumab on pfs_months differs between stage_iv=1 and stage_iv=0 patients (interaction).
The effect of treatment_bevacizumab on pfs_months differs between msi_high=1 and msi_high=0 patients (interaction).
The effect of treatment_bevacizumab on pfs_months differs between braf_v600e=1 and braf_v600e=0 patients (interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Bev effect kras_mutation=1: -0.02 vs kras_mutation=0: -0.02; interaction coef=-0.004, p=9.15e-01.
Bev effect right_sided_primary=1: -0.03 vs right_sided_primary=0: -0.01; interaction coef=-0.022, p=6.08e-01.
Bev effect stage_iv=1: -0.02 vs stage_iv=0: -0.01; interaction coef=-0.004, p=9.29e-01.
Bev effect msi_high=1: +0.07 vs msi_high=0: -0.02; interaction coef=+0.091, p=3.34e-01.
Bev effect braf_v600e=1: -0.24 vs braf_v600e=0: -0.01; interaction coef=-0.228, p=2.22e-02.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The effect of treatment_regorafenib on pfs_months differs between kras_mutation=1 and kras_mutation=0 patients (interaction).
The effect of treatment_regorafenib on pfs_months differs between nras_mutation=1 and nras_mutation=0 patients (interaction).
The effect of treatment_regorafenib on pfs_months differs between braf_v600e=1 and braf_v600e=0 patients (interaction).
The effect of treatment_regorafenib on pfs_months differs between msi_high=1 and msi_high=0 patients (interaction).
The effect of treatment_regorafenib on pfs_months differs between her2_amplified=1 and her2_amplified=0 patients (interaction).
The effect of treatment_regorafenib on pfs_months differs between ntrk_fusion=1 and ntrk_fusion=0 patients (interaction).
The effect of treatment_regorafenib on pfs_months differs between right_sided_primary=1 and right_sided_primary=0 patients (interaction).
The effect of treatment_regorafenib on pfs_months differs between stage_iv=1 and stage_iv=0 patients (interaction).
The effect of treatment_regorafenib on pfs_months differs between sex_female=1 and sex_female=0 patients (interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Rego effect kras_mutation=1: +0.03 vs kras_mutation=0: +1.66; interaction coef=-1.629, p=7.69e-226.
Rego effect nras_mutation=1: +1.93 vs nras_mutation=0: +0.94; interaction coef=+0.988, p=1.20e-11.
Rego effect braf_v600e=1: -0.16 vs braf_v600e=0: +1.03; interaction coef=-1.183, p=6.13e-23.
Rego effect msi_high=1: +0.95 vs msi_high=0: +0.97; interaction coef=-0.022, p=8.50e-01.
Rego effect her2_amplified=1: +0.87 vs her2_amplified=0: +0.98; interaction coef=-0.107, p=4.64e-01.
Rego effect ntrk_fusion=1: +1.44 vs ntrk_fusion=0: +0.97; interaction coef=+0.472, p=2.01e-01.
Rego effect right_sided_primary=1: +0.03 vs right_sided_primary=0: +1.48; interaction coef=-1.454, p=4.08e-168.
Rego effect stage_iv=1: +1.01 vs stage_iv=0: +0.94; interaction coef=+0.070, p=1.51e-01.
Rego effect sex_female=1: +0.99 vs sex_female=0: +0.96; interaction coef=+0.030, p=5.55e-01.
